$comment: Hand-maintained curation overrides for the Fungrim Phase-1 rule compiler (FUNGRIM-PLAN-5-LOADER.md §2.3/§2.6). Merged last by scripts/fungrim/compile-rules.ts. `overrides` entries ({ direction?, purpose?, target?, exclude?, note? }, keyed by corpus entry id) adjust or exclude compiled artifact rules. `transformAllowlist` promotes hand-vetted growth-neutral canonicalizations from 'expand' to 'transform' (the machine policy never emits 'transform'). `solveSeeds` is the §2.6 hand-curated solve-template seed set: it is NOT compiled into the M1 artifact and does not affect default loading — the M2 runtime loader compiles these entries into UNIVARIATE_ROOTS-style templates behind loadFungrim(ce, { solve: true }) (off by default, Q7).

8654a3.note: W(x*e^x) = x — seed for the LambertW root template _x*Exp(_x) + __b = 0 -> _x = LambertW(Negate(__b)). Off by default; validateRoots checks every candidate against the original equation, so an over-broad template degrades to a no-op, never a wrong answer.

ed7dac.note: LambertW branch -1 variant of 8654a3 (2-arg LambertW). Trips the compat-signature rule in M1 (CE's LambertW is 1-arg principal branch) and is therefore excluded from the artifact — revisit when branch support lands (Phase 2).

4c1e1e.note: Ln(Exp(z)) = z inverse composition. complex-domain guard accepted for solve templates because validateRoots filters every candidate against the original equation (the safety property promised by the ce.solveRules docs).

296627.note: Exp(Ln(z)) = z inverse composition. complex-domain guard accepted for solve templates because validateRoots filters every candidate against the original equation.

1f026d.note: Tan(Arctan(z)) = z inverse composition. complex-domain guard accepted for solve templates because validateRoots filters every candidate against the original equation.

f516e3.note: Arctan(Tan(theta)) = theta inverse composition (principal branch). complex-domain guard accepted for solve templates because validateRoots filters every candidate against the original equation.
